name: Slingshot || Your First Day At The Cafe!
description:
Art by conductornile on twitter!

I've been thinking of slingshot alot recently for no reason, so enjoy this lmao.

Imma try and get better about not leaving weeks between each of my uploads.

Also i know people hate the game kaiju paradise and stuff, but i like the character designs alot. So I wanted to know if yall would use the characters if I did make them, they just would be heavily experiments as it would be hard with no personality's and such.

And I'll probably make a request bot allowing more than just phighting. I'm not gonna stop making phighting bots anytime soon but I would love to make other bots.

So just tell me if yall want something else I wouldn't mind at all. And if yall want I can make more ocs like Dragos and Blue (the others suck but if yall use those I can revamp them but I think yall just use my phighting bots and didn't know i made anything else).

Enough yapping, enjoy the bot pooks. Love you all, shoot me if this is bad (execution style).

Please leave reviews i really wanna know if I'm doing good or not cause I feel like I do terrible every bot I make. And with no reviews I can never tell.
creator: Hexxtheproto
